// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="DataSet"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableDataSet
    {
        private DataSet _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableDataSet"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableDataSet(DataSet record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            Numbers = _record.Numbers.ToList();
            Metrics = new Dictionary<string, double>(_record.Metrics);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="DataSet"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public DataSet Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                Numbers = this.Numbers.ToImmutableList(),
                Metrics = this.Metrics.ToImmutableDictionary(),
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="DataSet"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public DataSet ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="DataSet"/> to <see cref="MutableDataSet"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableDataSet(DataSet record)
        {
            return new MutableDataSet(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an explicit conversion from <see cref="MutableDataSet"/> to <see cref="DataSet"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <remarks>Explicit because it allocates a new record; prefer <see cref="Build"/>.</remarks>
        public static explicit operator DataSet(MutableDataSet mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Numbers.
        /// </summary>
        public List<int> Numbers { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Metrics.
        /// </summary>
        public Dictionary<string, double> Metrics { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Sets <see cref="Name"/> and returns this wrapper so calls can be chained.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableDataSet WithName(string value)
        {
            Name = value;
            return this;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Sets <see cref="Numbers"/> and returns this wrapper so calls can be chained.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableDataSet WithNumbers(List<int> value)
        {
            Numbers = value;
            return this;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Sets <see cref="Metrics"/> and returns this wrapper so calls can be chained.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableDataSet WithMetrics(Dictionary<string, double> value)
        {
            Metrics = value;
            return this;
        }
    }
}
